case.title: ANDREWS v. CITY OF SAN BERNARDINO

opinion.h1: ANDREWS v. CITY OF SAN BERNARDINO, 364 U.S. 288 (1960)
opinion.h4: ANDREWS v. CITY OF SAN BERNARDINO ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, FOURTH APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 137. Decided October 10, 1960.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h4: HYAM v. UPPER MONTGOMERY JOINT AUTHORITY, 364 U.S. 288 (1960)
opinion.p: 364 U.S. 288 HYAM ET AL. v. UPPER MONTGOMERY JOINT AUTHORITY ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA. No. 150. Decided October 10, 1960.
Peyton Ford and J. Howard McGrath for appellants.
Aloysius B. McCabe and Joseph DuCoeur for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
